title: Teleportation Shrines
description: Linkable Shrines to fulfill all your teleportation needs!
body:
Are you tired of building nether portal hubs to connect your friends' and your homes, but in need for a **fast** and **efficient** way? Seems like **Teleportation Shrines** are exactly what you were looking for! This datapack adds **mystical shrines** which can be **connected** to travel **between different places at ease** :) ## Usage Teleportation Shrines can be crafted like this: ![First row: 3 Polished Blackstone; Second row: Ender Pearl, Eye of Ender, Ender Pearl; Third Row: Polished Blackstone, Soul Sand, Polished Blackstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/623d26280a13d3b8b2f016f2fc61a5a83bba8cd3.png) After you place them down you will be able to open their GUI and will be able to see and configure **5 carefully crafted refined types of the vanilla minecraft ores**! ![Teleportation Shrine GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d54b89616124d7cbf9a3130ecb306136ec19198.png)

You can click them to select the next one. (Toggling happens in this order: Emerald, Gold, Amethyst, Redstone, Lapis, repeat 🔂) If **two shrines show the same collection of ores in the same order** they will be **linked** - which means you can now teleport yourself from one to the other shrine! To do so simply stand on top of a linked shrine and sneak for a few seconds. If **blue particles** start appearing around your character, that means you did **everything correctly** and will be teleported shortly :)
...however if **red flames** start appearing around you you _might_ have **done something wrong** and I'd reccomend stepping off the shrine before it takes you to the wrong place... or causes you to _splinch_ The shrine you are **teleporting to** will also show **particles** to inform people around that someone new is arriving - keep that in mind while invading other people's places... your **invisibilty potion won't help you when dabbling in ancient magic** Speaking of ancient magic... our current understanding of it is limited, **preventing you from using this way of traveling in dimensions other than the overworld**- this may be changed as our knowledge evolves ⚠️ **Please note that even with the mod version of this datapack installed, you can not use /give to obtain shrines. Use `/loot give @s loot tp_shrines:block/teleportation_shrine` instead** ## Known Bugs These Bugs are known and should be kept in mind and will be fixed in a future update. To report new bugs please visit this datapack's GitHub page - **trying to put any item into one of the 5 "ore slots" in a Teleportation Shrine will permanently delete it. don't do this.** - none :) ## Interested in making your own datapacks? :) I am part of a small team of people owning **Datapack Hub**, the perfect discord server for helping you do just that! Wether you are just getting started or have advanced questions, with 1700+ members and our team of verified helpers we got you covered!
(This is 100% a passion project and I don't get paid anything for promoting this :))
[![Click here to join the Datapack Hub Discord server!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/732bc1ebde78aeed750745d52cb9089900b63d9a.png)](https://discord.com/invite/aEXsdjjdu4) ## Need a minecraft server?
